  "findings": [
    "No fire watch was present during the hot work operations.",
    "No fire watch was maintained for the required post-work monitoring period."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all hot work operations in the affected area.",
    "Establish a dedicated, trained fire watch with appropriate extinguishing equipment.",
    "Implement a mandatory hot work permit system and verify compliance before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Performing hot work without a dedicated fire watch during and after the operation violates fundamental safety standards, creating an immediate and critical fire hazard in a commercial construction environment.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B Section 5.6",
    "OSHA 1926.352"
  ]
}
